title: Reference decimal key screens
description: Canonical reusable value-extraction recipe for perps decimal formatting across the main mobile key screens. Uses tracked generic flows for setup/trade state and keeps screen-specific extraction inline here instead of adding more one-off committed flows.

btc-market-extract.expression: (function(){ function flat(v,out){ if(v===null||v===undefined)return; if(typeof v==='string'||typeof v==='number'){ var s=String(v).trim(); if(s) out.push(s); return; } if(Array.isArray(v)){ for(var i=0;i<v.length;i++) flat(v[i],out); return; } if(v&&v.props&&v.props.children!==undefined){ flat(v.props.children,out); } } function find(testId){ var hook=globalThis.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__; if(!hook||!hook.renderers||!hook.getFiberRoots)return null; var found=null; function walk(f){ if(!f||found)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.testID===testId){ found=f; return; } walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } var it=hook.renderers.entries(); var step=it.next(); while(!step.done){ var roots=hook.getFiberRoots(step.value[0]); if(roots){ roots.forEach(function(r){ if(!found&&r.current) walk(r.current); }); } if(found) break; step=it.next(); } return found; } function collect(root){ var out=[]; function walk(f){ if(!f)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.children!==undefined) flat(p.children,out); walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } walk(root); return out; } function firstMatch(arr,re){ for(var i=0;i<arr.length;i++){ if(re.test(arr[i])) return arr[i]; } return null; } var header=collect(find('perps-market-header')); return JSON.stringify({symbol:'BTC',screen:'market_detail',price:firstMatch(header,/^\$/),change:firstMatch(header,/%$/)}); })()

btc-order-mode.expression: (function(){ function ids(){ var hook=globalThis.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__; var out=[]; if(!hook||!hook.renderers||!hook.getFiberRoots) return out; function walk(f){ if(!f)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.testID) out.push(String(p.testID)); walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } var it=hook.renderers.entries(); var step=it.next(); while(!step.done){ var roots=hook.getFiberRoots(step.value[0]); if(roots){ roots.forEach(function(r){ if(r.current) walk(r.current); }); } step=it.next(); } return Array.from(new Set(out)); } var all=ids(); return JSON.stringify({hasLong:all.indexOf('perps-market-details-long-button')!==-1,hasModify:all.indexOf('perps-market-details-modify-button')!==-1}); })()

btc-order-extract.expression: (function(){ function flat(v,out){ if(v===null||v===undefined)return; if(typeof v==='string'||typeof v==='number'){ var s=String(v).trim(); if(s) out.push(s); return; } if(Array.isArray(v)){ for(var i=0;i<v.length;i++) flat(v[i],out); return; } if(v&&v.props&&v.props.children!==undefined){ flat(v.props.children,out); } } function find(testId){ var hook=globalThis.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__; if(!hook||!hook.renderers||!hook.getFiberRoots)return null; var found=null; function walk(f){ if(!f||found)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.testID===testId){ found=f; return; } walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } var it=hook.renderers.entries(); var step=it.next(); while(!step.done){ var roots=hook.getFiberRoots(step.value[0]); if(roots){ roots.forEach(function(r){ if(!found&&r.current) walk(r.current); }); } if(found) break; step=it.next(); } return found; } function collect(root){ var out=[]; function walk(f){ if(!f)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.children!==undefined) flat(p.children,out); walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } walk(root); return out; } function collectAll(){ var hook=globalThis.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__; var out=[]; if(!hook||!hook.renderers||!hook.getFiberRoots) return out; function walk(f){ if(!f)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.children!==undefined) flat(p.children,out); walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } var it=hook.renderers.entries(); var step=it.next(); while(!step.done){ var roots=hook.getFiberRoots(step.value[0]); if(roots){ roots.forEach(function(r){ if(r.current) walk(r.current); }); } step=it.next(); } return out; } function firstAfter(arr,label,re){ var idx=arr.indexOf(label); if(idx===-1)return null; for(var i=idx+1;i<arr.length;i++){ if(re.test(arr[i])) return arr[i]; } return null; } function firstMatch(arr,re){ for(var i=0;i<arr.length;i++){ if(re.test(arr[i])) return arr[i]; } return null; } var header=collect(find('perps-order-header')); var all=collectAll(); return JSON.stringify({symbol:'BTC',screen:'order_entry',price:firstMatch(header,/^\$\d/),change:firstMatch(header,/%$/),margin:firstAfter(all,'Margin',/^\$|^-/),liquidationPrice:firstAfter(all,'Liquidation price',/^\$|^-/),fees:firstAfter(all,'Fees',/^\$|^-/)}); })()

eth-position-extract.expression: (function(){ function flat(v,out){ if(v===null||v===undefined)return; if(typeof v==='string'||typeof v==='number'){ var s=String(v).trim(); if(s) out.push(s); return; } if(Array.isArray(v)){ for(var i=0;i<v.length;i++) flat(v[i],out); return; } if(v&&v.props&&v.props.children!==undefined){ flat(v.props.children,out); } } function collectAll(){ var hook=globalThis.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__; var out=[]; if(!hook||!hook.renderers||!hook.getFiberRoots) return out; function walk(f){ if(!f)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.children!==undefined) flat(p.children,out); walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } var it=hook.renderers.entries(); var step=it.next(); while(!step.done){ var roots=hook.getFiberRoots(step.value[0]); if(roots){ roots.forEach(function(r){ if(r.current) walk(r.current); }); } step=it.next(); } return out; } function firstAfter(arr,label,re){ var idx=arr.indexOf(label); if(idx===-1)return null; for(var i=idx+1;i<arr.length;i++){ if(re.test(arr[i])) return arr[i]; } return null; } var all=collectAll(); return JSON.stringify({symbol:'ETH',screen:'position_detail',size:firstAfter(all,'Size',/^\$|^[0-9.]/),margin:firstAfter(all,'Margin',/^\$|^[0-9.]/),entry:firstAfter(all,'Entry price',/^\$|^[0-9.]/),liquidationPrice:firstAfter(all,'Liquidation price',/^\$|^[0-9.]/),funding:firstAfter(all,'Funding payments',/^\$|^-\$|^[0-9.]/)}); })()

eth-reverse-extract.expression: (function(){ function t(id){var hook=globalThis.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__; if(!hook||!hook.renderers||!hook.getFiberRoots)return null; var found=null; function walk(f){ if(!f||found)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.testID===id){ found=f; return; } walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } var it=hook.renderers.entries(); var step=it.next(); while(!step.done){ var roots=hook.getFiberRoots(step.value[0]); if(roots){ roots.forEach(function(r){ if(!found&&r.current) walk(r.current); }); } if(found) break; step=it.next(); } if(!found||!found.memoizedProps) return null; var c=found.memoizedProps.children; if(Array.isArray(c)) return c.join('').trim()||null; return String(c||'').trim()||null; } return JSON.stringify({symbol:'ETH',screen:'reverse_modal',estSize:t('perps-flip-position-est-size-value'),fees:t('perps-flip-position-fees-value')}); })()

eth-margin-extract.expression: (function(){ function flat(v,out){ if(v===null||v===undefined)return; if(typeof v==='string'||typeof v==='number'){ var s=String(v).trim(); if(s) out.push(s); return; } if(Array.isArray(v)){ for(var i=0;i<v.length;i++) flat(v[i],out); return; } if(v&&v.props&&v.props.children!==undefined){ flat(v.props.children,out); } } function collectAll(){ var hook=globalThis.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__; var out=[]; if(!hook||!hook.renderers||!hook.getFiberRoots) return out; function walk(f){ if(!f)return; var p=f.memoizedProps; if(p&&p.children!==undefined) flat(p.children,out); walk(f.child); walk(f.sibling); } var it=hook.renderers.entries(); var step=it.next(); while(!step.done){ var roots=hook.getFiberRoots(step.value[0]); if(roots){ roots.forEach(function(r){ if(r.current) walk(r.current); }); } step=it.next(); } return out; } function firstAfter(arr,label,re){ var idx=arr.indexOf(label); if(idx===-1)return null; for(var i=idx+1;i<arr.length;i++){ if(re.test(arr[i])) return arr[i]; } return null; } var all=collectAll(); return JSON.stringify({symbol:'ETH',screen:'remove_margin',available:firstAfter(all,'Margin available to remove',/^\$|^[0-9.]/),liquidationPrice:firstAfter(all,'Liquidation price',/^\$|^[0-9.]/),liquidationDistance:firstAfter(all,'Liquidation distance',/^[0-9.]+%/)}); })()

done.message: Captured reusable mobile decimal/value reference data across key perps screens.
